episode_summary: A Little Fish mailbag episode where the team share listener-submitted curios: from the Dogs Playing Poker artist’s mosquito opera and the pseudonymous poet duo Michael Field, to Amundsen’s well-fed polar team and an octillion laser pointers to blow up Earth, with assorted detours into nominative determinism, last meals, Olympic plant names, and peacock “lasers.”

facts.fact: This is a fact that is sent into us by James Udell and it is the artist behind the famous dogs playing poker paintings. Also once wrote a comic opera about an anthropomorphic giant mosquito.
But it's Michael Field is a very interesting poet because he, quote unquote, was two women Catherine Bradley and Edith Cooper, aka Bradley Cooper.
So the first one is that "Rolled Adminson's Polar Thrust" was so well planned that all five in his group had gained weight upon returning to base camp.
According to Lucas' calculations, it is 1.422 octillion.
